narrative:
Springfield V (precinct in Hamilton County) has 940 registered voters, with 44.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.0 percentage points.
